transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today, I prepared baby octopus, beef small intestines, and shrimp
This is 7 servings
I was going to order 8 servings I don't know why I ordered 7
It's from PalPal Nakji from Noryangjin
It was one of the best I had
7-minute timer please
The owner was super nice
Heat it up for 7 minutes, etc
Dine-in experience was amazing So I wanted to
But can't because of covid
I hope everyone can limit themselves from going out so covid disappears
I have bean sprouts here Should I put that in?
Bon appetit
This is a lot of food!
How do I eat this?

Beef small intestines
Baby octopus They're big
That's so tender
Shrimp
Jingu~
Yes, that's a cat
Why is it spicy today?
I have this
Cream sauce
Should I get some rice?
I think I'll need it
This is for the fried rice, but whatever
That's a big piece of baby octopus
Oh no! Get on
So good
The seasoning sauce is very savory

It's a "popular" flavor
Let's put in these perilla leaves
It's a bit spicy, but it's tasty
It's hot but I'm still eating it
Really yummy
Should I bring Ramyun noodles?
I want that more than the rice
The noodles look so small compared to the dish
I only did 1 pack of noodles because I was in a hurry
And it looks so small
Stack it on top
It's almost like Somyun (thin flour noodles)
It's so good with the noodles
I apologize Wooden chopsticks
Yes, it's the leftover cream sauce from the other day
It tastes like something everyone would like

Really, it's a familiar taste
It's not special
Everyone probably had it before and it can't possibly taste bad
It's a delicious spicy-baby-octopus-over-rice sauce
I'll put the rice since everyone says that it looks salty
Rice effect
It would look salty if there were cartilage
But it doesn't anymore because of the rice
[Chat: Isn't it spicy?]
How do I say this?
Why are my lips like this?
It's not spicy but numbing(?)
My lips are almost like
It's getting bloated
[Chat: 3 servings of chicken gizzard] Hey! Watch it
Just kidding

Look how thick the octopus are
How is it this good?
It's not salty nor spicy
It's not spicy
The flavors are very strong
It's not salty, but strong flavors
You tend to not want to eat that much if it's salty
It's not like that, but it has strong flavors
Ramyun noodles are exactly like that, no?
It's like that
Take some rice
The ones I've had before,
The beef small intestines
weren't the best quality
But these are great
I like it because there aren't a lot of vegetables

You guys should've told me
Sorry
I think I need to take out some vegetables
And just eat the meat chunks as fried rice

Let's take out some sauce and the vegetables
Do I need 1 more bowl of rice?
Cheese? I'll go check
Let's turn it off
Good job
Incredible
Yum
Bon appetit
It has a perfect crust on the bottom
It's not salty It's perfect
Beef small intestines

Together

So good
Egg yolk
Let's mix it up
Egg yolk
Jingu~
You're going to fall
So cute
Cutie pie
He was so cute, I couldn't resist
This is really amazing
I don't really eat fried rice
1 last big bite
I shouldn't scrape this I can see the black stuff come off

I have to put the finger in here for the wine

My face
